message:
feat(core): deepen telemetry conformance validation with field-level checks

Extend the ConformanceHarness in host_adapter.rs to validate
event-specific payload fields beyond just instance/correlation/basics.
Previously, search/embedding/index/resource/lifecycle events were only
checked for structural presence (non-empty instance, valid correlation).
Now each event type has dedicated validators that enforce semantic
invariants on their payload data.

Search event validation (validate_search_event):
- Reject zero latency_us (search that completed must have >0 latency)
- Reject result_count > 0 when both lexical_count and semantic_count
  are zero (results must come from somewhere)
- Reject result_count exceeding lexical_count + semantic_count
  (deduplication can reduce but never inflate)

Embedding event validation (validate_embedding_event, new function):
- Require non-empty job_id
- Require doc_count > 0
- Require non-empty embedder id
- Require dimension > 0
- Still delegates to validate_duration_event for zero-duration check

Index event validation (validate_index_event, new function):
- Require dimension > 0
- Still delegates to validate_duration_event

Resource event validation (validate_resource_event):
- Require cpu_pct to be finite and within [0, 100]
- Require load_avg_1m (when present) to be finite and >= 0

Lifecycle event validation (validate_lifecycle_event):
- Reject empty-but-present reason string
- Reject zero uptime_ms when provided

Test additions (6 new tests):
- validate_envelope_search_zero_latency_and_source_mismatch_are_reported
- validate_envelope_embedding_required_fields_are_enforced
- validate_envelope_index_zero_dimension_is_reported
- validate_envelope_resource_numeric_ranges_are_enforced
- validate_envelope_lifecycle_optional_fields_are_validated_when_present
- Extended adapter_emits_lifecycle_events to cover HealthTick + SessionStop

error.rs docstring update:
- Reword SearchError doc comment to describe lexical-only fallback
  behavior instead of referencing the removed "hash embedder" concept
- Update EmbeddingFailed error message to mention lexical fallback
  instead of "fall back to hash embedder"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
